question: How many battles did not lose any ship with tonnage '225'?
gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM battle WHERE id NOT IN ( SELECT lost_in_battle FROM ship WHERE tonnage  =  '225' );
predicted_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM battle WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT lost_in_batt FROM ship WHERE tonn = 225)
raw_response: SELECT count(*) FROM battle WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT lost_in_batt FROM ship WHERE tonn = 225)
